name: Sauteed Spinach with Garlic and Chilies (Rau
recipeIngredient: 6 cloves Garlic, peeled and finely chopped
6 red chilies, HOT - finely sliced (or use 2 green chilies, finely sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and remove the leaves.
2. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add spinach leaves and cook until wilted. Drain the spinach in a strainer.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. When hot, add garlic and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add chilies and stir once or twice.
5. Add spinach to the pan along with stock, soy sauce, and salt. Continue stirring-frying on high heat for another minute or so.
6. Serve 4 servings.
